---
title: "TSQ Structural Figures"
project:
    execute-dir: project
format:
  html: default
  revealjs:
    title-slide: false
    output-file: structural_figures.html
---

## Index {#index}

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis
fig_dir <- "data/figures"

cat("<div class='index-scroll'>\n\n")
figs <- fs::dir_ls(fig_dir, glob = "*.svg")
figs <- sort(figs)

titles <- fs::path_ext_remove(fs::path_file(figs)) |>
  stringr::str_remove("_structure_plots")

ids <- titles |>
  tolower() |>
  stringr::str_replace_all("[^a-z0-9]+", "-") |>
  stringr::str_replace_all("(^-|-$)", "")

for (i in seq_along(titles)) {
  cat("- [", titles[i], "](#", ids[i], ")\n", sep = "")
}
cat("\n</div>\n")

for (i in seq_along(figs)) {
  cat("## ", titles[i], " {#", ids[i], "}\n\n", sep = "")
  cat("![](", figs[i], ")\n\n", sep = "")
}
```

<style>
.index-scroll {
  max-height: 70vh;
  overflow-y: auto;
  padding-right: 0.5rem;
  border: 1px solid #ddd;
  border-radius: 6px;
}
</style>
